data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the Ohmpilot device
data_description.modbus_port: Modbus TCP port of the Ohmpilot (default: 503)
data_description.http_port: HTTP API port of the Ohmpilot (default: 81)
data_description.heater1_maximum_power: Maximum power output of heater 1 in watts
